vBRIEFInfo.author: overdeck/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-2151: Decompose src/dashboard/server/routes/misc.ts (1835 lines) into focused modules

plan.title: Decompose src/dashboard/server/routes/misc.ts (1835 lines) into focused modules
plan.author: agent:claude-fable-5

narratives.Problem: src/dashboard/server/routes/misc.ts is 1832 lines (baselined at 1835 in scripts/file-size-baseline.txt:20) — a catch-all god file of ~37 API route handlers spanning trackers, project-mappings, health, deacon control, planning sessions, TLDR, cache, metrics, shadow, and dev endpoints. Flagged by the A3 file-size campaign. Its public surface is only readPackageVersion + miscRouteLayer (named and default), consumed by server.ts:51 and tests/dashboard/version-api.test.ts:13.
narratives.Proposal: Pure relocation into topical submodules under a new sibling dir src/dashboard/server/routes/misc/ (shared, trackers, project-mappings, health, deacon, planning, tldr, meta), each exporting a sub-layer. misc.ts becomes a thin barrel that re-exports readPackageVersion and composes miscRouteLayer = Layer.mergeAll(<sub-layers>, bootReconciliationRouteLayer). A barrel-exports freeze test lands first (PAN-2146 pattern). One seam per commit, full gate (typecheck + lint + full vitest) after each. Full seam-by-seam detail with verified line citations lives in .pan/drafts/PAN-2151.md.
narratives.NonGoals:
- No logic edits, no renamed exports, no added/removed routes — pure relocation only.
- No modernization of moved code: the sync sendKeys/sessionExists tmux calls and the require() in getIssueDataService move verbatim (fixing them is follow-up work, not this issue).
- No decomposition or relocation of boot-reconciliation.ts (already extracted).
- No importer edits: server.ts and tests/dashboard/version-api.test.ts stay untouched.
- No file-size-baseline regeneration beyond updating the single misc.ts line.
- No new public API surface: the barrel exports exactly what misc.ts exports today (default, miscRouteLayer, readPackageVersion).
narratives.Risks: (1) Effect Layer / HttpRouter import paths must move with the routes; a missed import surfaces immediately at typecheck. (2) Module-level state with external writers would be unsafe to duplicate — verified there are none: pendingConfirmations has no writers outside misc.ts. (3) misc.ts is in eslint-any-allowlist.json:78; any explicit any that moves must carry its new file into the allowlist or lint fails (the moved any all lands in misc/meta.ts). (4) The full suite must run per seam (the file-size + any ratchets live in npm run lint), not just changed tests. (5) getProjectPath (shared) calls getProjectMappings (project-mappings group) — the extract-project-mappings bead states the resolution rule.

autoDecisions.summary: Reused the 2026-06-30 planning session's seam grouping and PRD draft; this session fixed spec-contract violations (plan.id, uid, required metadata) rather than re-deriving the decomposition.
autoDecisions.rationale: The prior grouping was verified against the file by symbol-usage grep this session and remains correct; re-planning from scratch would discard verified work.

autoDecisions.summary: Added a barrel-exports freeze test as the first bead (misc-barrel-exports.test.ts).
autoDecisions.rationale: PAN-2146 (agents.ts decomposition) landed the same pattern first, and the additive-refactor rule requires a no-loss audit gate before deletion/replacement.

autoDecisions.summary: Submodules live under a sibling directory src/dashboard/server/routes/misc/ (not flat in routes/).
autoDecisions.rationale: Keeps the relocation scoped and obvious; matches the existing routes/workspaces/ precedent.

autoDecisions.summary: misc.ts re-exports readPackageVersion from misc/shared.ts so tests/dashboard/version-api.test.ts resolves unchanged.
autoDecisions.rationale: Zero call-site changes is a hard issue requirement; re-exporting satisfies it without repointing tests.

autoDecisions.summary: Cross-group helper rule: a helper used by routes in 2+ submodules goes to misc/shared.ts; otherwise it moves into its single owning submodule.
autoDecisions.rationale: Mechanical rule verified by usage grep; removes per-helper judgment calls from the work agent.

autoDecisions.summary: Seams run sequentially (linear blocks chain); one seam per commit with the full gate between each.
autoDecisions.rationale: Every seam mutates misc.ts (shared mutation), and the issue requires the full gate after each seam; sequencing keeps regressions bisectable.

autoDecisions.summary: Only shared-helpers carries requiresInspection: true; all extraction seams are false.
autoDecisions.rationale: shared.ts is the one foundation every later seam imports; extraction seams are mechanical moves whose defects surface at typecheck/the freeze test, matching the inspection rubric.

autoDecisions.summary: boot-reconciliation.ts stays where it is; the barrel keeps merging bootReconciliationRouteLayer unchanged.
autoDecisions.rationale: It is already extracted; touching it would exceed the pure-relocation scope.

items.title: Add barrel-exports freeze test for routes/misc.ts before any extraction

expected_outputs: lint completes without errors (file-size guard + A1 ratchet included)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/__tests__/misc-barrel-exports.test.ts mirroring src/lib/__tests__/agents-barrel-exports.test.ts (PAN-2146 precedent). It must import * as barrel from '../misc.js' and assert Object.keys(barrel).sort() equals exactly ['default','miscRouteLayer','readPackageVersion']. This is the no-loss audit gate: it locks the public surface before any code moves. No source files change in this bead.

items.title: New test misc-barrel-exports.test.ts validates that the misc.ts barrel exports exactly default, miscRouteLayer, and readPackageVersion (sorted Object.keys equality, PAN-2146 pattern)
npm run typecheck and npm run lint both succeed and npx vitest run --configLoader runner exits with 0 failed tests
Create misc/shared.ts with cross-group helpers; misc.ts imports/re-exports from it

expected_outputs: lint completes without errors (file-size guard + A1 ratchet included)

narrative.Action: Create directory src/dashboard/server/routes/misc/. Move verbatim from misc.ts into misc/shared.ts, exporting each: readPackageVersion (misc.ts:92), _overdeckVersion/getOverdeckVersion (:110-116), overdeckDevMode (:119), readJsonBody (:314), getProjectPath (:167), isGitHubIssue (:181), getGitHubLocalPaths (:194). In misc.ts add: export { readPackageVersion } from './misc/shared.js'; and import the other helpers from './misc/shared.js'. Move only the node/lib imports these helpers need; delete now-dead imports from misc.ts. Do NOT edit any helper body.

items.title: misc/shared.ts contains readPackageVersion, getOverdeckVersion, overdeckDevMode, readJsonBody, getProjectPath, isGitHubIssue, and getGitHubLocalPaths with unchanged bodies, and misc.ts re-exports readPackageVersion from it
tests/dashboard/version-api.test.ts passes unmodified — its import of readPackageVersion from routes/misc.js still resolves
npm run typecheck and npm run lint both succeed and npx vitest run --configLoader runner exits with 0 failed tests
Extract tracker + rally routes into misc/trackers.ts

expected_outputs: lint completes without errors (file-size guard + A1 ratchet included)

narrative.Action: Move verbatim postTrackersRefreshRoute (misc.ts:326), getTrackerStatusRoute (:551), postRallyValidateRoute (:631) into misc/trackers.ts. Export const trackersRouteLayer = Layer.mergeAll(postTrackersRefreshRoute, getTrackerStatusRoute, postRallyValidateRoute). Import needed helpers from './shared.js' and move the lib imports these routes use. In misc.ts replace the three route consts in the mergeAll with trackersRouteLayer imported from './misc/trackers.js'; delete dead imports.

Export projectMappingsRouteLayer = Layer.mergeAll(...). Update misc.ts composition; delete dead imports.

narrative.Action: Move verbatim the remaining 13 routes: getVersionRoute (misc.ts:833), getRegisteredProjectsRoute (:853), getConfirmationsRoute (:882), postConfirmationRespondRoute (:890), getSkillsRoute (:930), getCacheStatusRoute (:1504), clearCacheRoute (:1519), getMetricsRuntimesRoute (:1535), getMetricsTasksRoute (:1586), postShadowMonitorRoute (:1619), postShadowObserveRoute (:1665), postDevRebuildRoute (:1740), postRestartDashboardRoute (:1770) plus group-local helpers getIssueDataService (:134), ConfirmationRequest/pendingConfirmations (:209/:218), METRICS_FILE/loadRuntimeMetrics (:237/:239), overdeckProjectRoot (:1727), execAsync (:88). Export metaRouteLayer = Layer.mergeAll(...). This file carries the moved explicit any (loadRuntimeMetrics Promise<any> at :239, comparators at :1543/:1600) — add src/dashboard/server/routes/misc/meta.ts to eslint-any-allowlist.json in this same commit. Check wc -l; if over 1000, split shadow+dev routes into misc/meta-ops.ts along the route boundaries. Update misc.ts composition; delete dead imports.

Reduce misc.ts to a thin barrel; update size baseline + any-allowlist; final gate

expected_outputs: lint completes without errors (file-size guard + A1 ratchet included)

narrative.Action: Verify misc.ts now contains only: the header route-inventory comment, imports of the seven sub-layers + bootReconciliationRouteLayer, export { readPackageVersion } from './misc/shared.js', miscRouteLayer = Layer.mergeAll(<seven sub-layers>, bootReconciliationRouteLayer), and export default miscRouteLayer. Update scripts/file-size-baseline.txt:20 from '1835 src/dashboard/server/routes/misc.ts' to the barrel's actual new line count (PAN-2146 precedent: agents.ts 5824 -> 86). If misc.ts no longer contains explicit any, remove its entry from eslint-any-allowlist.json (currently line 78). Run wc -l on every misc/*.ts to confirm all under 1000. The freeze test from freeze-barrel-exports must still run green unmodified.

items.title: misc.ts contains only imports, the readPackageVersion re-export, the miscRouteLayer composition, and the default export (a thin barrel, roughly 80 lines or fewer)
scripts/file-size-baseline.txt records the barrel's shrunk line count for misc.ts and scripts/lint-file-size.sh exits 0
misc-barrel-exports.test.ts and tests/dashboard/version-api.test.ts both run green unmodified, and src/dashboard/server/server.ts resolves miscRouteLayer with no importer edits anywhere
npm run typecheck and npm run lint both succeed and npx vitest run --configLoader runner exits with 0 failed tests
